# Forgefy

> Forgefy joins your planning meetings, extracts what your team decided, and builds Flutter, React Native, and Next.js apps from it — automatically.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, how it works, example apps, and pricing.
- [Documentation](/documentation): How to use Forgefy — sessions, blueprints, builds, databases, GitHub, and billing.
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
